_comment: TRUE POSITIVE — SP-710001: Privilegierter Kubernetes Pod erstellt (Container Escape Risiko)
scenario: Attacker with kubectl access creates a privileged pod with hostPath / mount to escape to the node filesystem
why_tp: Pod created with privileged: true — full host capabilities
hostPath '/' mounted — attacker can read/write the entire node filesystem
Created in 'production' namespace — high blast radius
Service account bound to cluster-admin (escalated privileges)
Pod name 'debug-pod-*' is a common attacker pattern
analyst_action: IMMEDIATE: Delete the pod 'debug-pod-xk8s2' in namespace production
Revoke or restrict the ClusterRoleBinding for 'attacker-svc-account'
Check if any data was exfiltrated via the hostPath mount (audit node filesystem access)
Enable Pod Security Admission (PSA) with 'restricted' policy in production namespace
